input.text: Our product will 100% definitely cure your headaches in under 5 minutes, guaranteed.

rules.description: No absolute medical claims (cure, guaranteed, 100% effective).
No specific time-to-relief promises without clinical citation.

violations.explanation: Uses 'cure' and '100% definitely' — both prohibited absolute medical claims.
violations.suggested_rewording: May help relieve headache symptoms for some people

violations.explanation: Specific time-to-relief promise without supporting clinical citation.
violations.suggested_rewording: with onset of relief varying by individual

expected.summary: Two violations — remove absolute claims and specific time promises before publishing.

input.text: Our team is here to help you understand your options.
